abu_dhabi.note: Meters mandatory. Airport to city ~AED 50–80. Careem and Uber both operate here.

agra.note: Vehicles cannot enter Taj Mahal restricted zones — walk the last stretch. Ola available. Negotiate for half-day sightseeing.

algiers.note: Meters rarely used — negotiate fare before boarding. Airport to city ~800–1,200 DA.

aleppo.note: ⚠️ Check your government's travel advisory. Post-conflict recovery — currency and taxi rates highly unstable. USD may be preferred.

amman.note: Insist on meter — many drivers ignore it. White taxis with yellow plates. Airport to city ~JOD 15–20. Careem and Uber available.

amsterdam.note: Tariff 2 after 23:00 and holidays. Tram/metro is often faster and much cheaper.

antalya.note: Insist on meter. Airport to city ~250–400 ₺. Rates change with Turkish inflation.

athens.note: Airport fixed rate ~€38 day / €54 night. Always confirm before entering.

atlanta.note: Uber/Lyft dominant. MARTA rail from ATL airport to downtown ~$2.50 — far cheaper than a taxi (~$35–45).

auckland.note: Uber widely used. Airport to CBD ~NZ$65–80. Airbus Express coach NZ$18.

bangkok.note: Insist on the meter — say 'meter please'. Airport expressway adds ~50฿ toll paid by passenger.

beijing.note: DiDi easiest for non-Chinese speakers. Airport express trains recommended. Night surcharge after 23:00.

berlin.note: Night surcharge 23:00–06:00. S-Bahn/U-Bahn are faster and cheaper for most routes.

bogota.note: Yellow metered taxis available. Use Cabify or InDriver for safety. Altitude 2,600m — acclimatise before exertion.

brussels.note: Night/weekend supplement applies. Zaventem airport to city ~€45–55. Train to Brussels Midi ~€3.40.

bucharest.note: Use Bolt or Uber — street taxis at OTP airport notorious for overcharging tourists.

budapest.note: Meter mandatory — licensed taxis regulated by BKK. Bolt and Uber are cheapest. Airport to city ~8,000–12,000 Ft. Night rate 22:00–06:00 is higher.

buenos_aires.note: ⚠️ Rates change frequently due to high inflation. Use Cabify or InDriver for fixed pricing. Verify current rates on arrival.

burgas.note: Very affordable. Beach resort taxis may charge more in summer. Airport to resort areas ~10–20 лв.

cairo.note: Negotiate fare before entering — meters often unused. Use Uber or Careem for transparent pricing.

cancun.note: Hotel Zone taxis have fixed zone rates — always negotiate before boarding. ADO bus for airport ~MXN 95.

cape_town.note: Uber safer option. CPT airport to V&A Waterfront ~R200–350. Metered taxis less common.

caracas.note: ⚠️ Serious security concerns — use hotel-arranged or trusted transport only. USD is effectively the transaction currency.

casablanca.note: Red petit taxis for in-city — insist on meter. Airport to city ~200–300 MAD by grand taxi.

chennai.note: Ola and Uber widely available. Auto-rickshaws for shorter trips. AC taxis ~25% more.

chiang_mai.note: Red songthaews (shared trucks) ~30฿ per person. Grab available. Airport to old city ~150–200฿. Negotiate for non-app rides.

chicago.note: CTA Blue Line from O'Hare ~$5 — far cheaper than taxi (~$45–60). Uber/Lyft also widely available.

christchurch.note: Uber and local cabs available. Airport to city centre ~NZ$30–45.

colombo.note: PickMe app is safest. Three-wheelers (tuk-tuks) for short trips. Airport (Katunayake) is 35 km north — ~Rs 2,500–4,000 by metered taxi. Allow 1.5 hrs.

copenhagen.note: Metered and reliable but expensive. Bolt and Uber available. CPH airport to city ~250–350 kr — Metro M2 far cheaper (~36 DKK, 15 min).

damascus.note: ⚠️ Check your government's travel advisory. Syria in post-conflict transition — currency and infrastructure remain highly unstable.

delhi.note: Airport prepaid taxi counter safest for arrivals. Uber/Ola reliable. Delhi Metro recommended for key routes.

denpasar.note: Blue Bird and GrabCar recommended. Airport has fixed-rate taxi zones. Motorbike taxis (GrabBike) cheap for solo short trips.

doha.note: Karwa (official orange taxis) use meters. Uber and Careem available. Hamad International Airport to West Bay ~40–70 QR.

dubai.note: Airport fee AED 20. Night rate (22:00–06:00) AED 6 flag fall. Fully metered, regulated by RTA.

dublin.note: Airport to city ~€20–30. Night rates after 20:00. Taximeter mandatory.

east_province.note: Covers Dammam, Al Khobar, Dhahran. Uber and Careem dominate — street taxis rare.

edinburgh.note: Black cabs regulated. Airport to city ~£25–35. Lothian Buses much cheaper alternative.

edirne.note: Border city near Greece and Bulgaria. Straightforward metered taxis. Very affordable.

florence.note: Night/Sunday supplements apply. Airport to city ~€25–30. ZTL restricted zone in historic centre.

frankfurt.note: Airport S-Bahn to Hauptbahnhof ~€5 in 11 min — excellent value. Taxi airport to city ~€25–35.

guangzhou.note: DiDi widely used. Metro is excellent and very cheap. Night surcharge applies.

halong.note: Most visitors arrive by organised tour from Hanoi. Local taxis for Ha Long City. Bay cruises are separate bookings.

hangzhou.note: Home of West Lake. DiDi and metered taxis available. Metro serves main tourist areas.

hanoi.note: Use Grab or Be app. Reputable metered: Noi Bai (white), Mai Linh (green). Noi Bai airport is 45 km from Old Quarter — Grab recommended (~200,000–300,000 ₫).

havana.note: USD is the practical tourist currency. Official Cubataxi (metered) recommended. Private classic-car taxis cheaper — agree fare before boarding. Airport to Old Havana ~$25–35.

ho_chi_minh.note: Use Grab or Be app. Reputable metered cabs: Vinasun (white), Mai Linh (green). GrabBike cheapest for solo riders.

hong_kong.note: Cross-harbour tunnel charge added to fare. Airport Express train 24 min for HK$115 — strongly recommended.

honolulu.note: Limited public transit. HNL to Waikiki ~$35–55 by taxi, or TheBus route 20 for $3.

houston.note: Limited public transit — Uber/Lyft standard. IAH airport to downtown ~$50–80 (very far from city).

hurghada.note: Negotiate fare before boarding. Tuk-tuks for very short trips. Beachfront to airport ~E£100–150.

istanbul.note: Insist on meter. Bridge and tunnel tolls added on top. Rates change with Turkish inflation. Havaist bus from IST airport much cheaper.

jakarta.note: Use Blue Bird or Grab — street taxis may overcharge tourists. Traffic is extreme; allow extra time.

jaipur.note: Ola and Uber available. Auto-rickshaws common for short distances within Pink City.

johannesburg.note: Uber strongly recommended — never hail a street taxi in JHB. OR Tambo airport to Sandton ~R350–500 via Uber.

kolkata.note: Yellow ambassador taxis (metered) and Ola/Uber available. Trams still run in some areas.

krabi.note: No metered taxis — negotiate fares. Airport to Ao Nang ~300–500฿. Boat taxis for island and beach access.

kuala_lumpur.note: Insist on meter. KLIA Express train from KLIA airport is faster and cheaper (~RM 55).

kyiv.note: ⚠️ Ukraine is in an active conflict — check your government's travel advisory. Uber and Bolt operate where safe.

las_vegas.note: Taxis mandated from arrivals kerb. Uber/Lyft at separate rideshare area. Strip resort to resort ~$15–25.

lima.note: InDriver and Beat apps highly recommended for safety — never hail a roadside taxi in Lima.

lisbon.note: Airport to centre ~€15–25. Night/weekend rate higher. Electric trams cheaper and scenic.

london.note: Black cabs metered and regulated. Congestion zone charge £15 applies in zone during hours. Uber also available.

los_angeles.note: LA has minimal public transit — Uber/Lyft ubiquitous. LAX to Hollywood ~$45–70. Flyaway bus to Union Station ~$9.75.

macau.note: Macau is small — most rides short. Casino shuttles often free. Airport to Cotai Strip ~MOP 80–100.

madrid.note: Airport supplement €6.70. Night/weekend rate 21:00–07:00. Metro Line 8 from Barajas cheaper (~€3).

manila.note: Grab is safest and most reliable for tourists. Metro Manila traffic can be extreme — allow significant extra time.

marrakech.note: Red petit taxis use meters — demand they use them. Medina has fixed zone rates. Night rate higher.

mecca.note: Entry restricted to Muslims only. Uber and Careem standard. Grand Mosque area has special transport during Hajj/Umrah.

melbourne.note: Airport pickup fee A$3.87. SkyBus to city centre cheaper at ~A$32.

mexico_city.note: Use authorised airport taxis (prepay booths) only — never hail on street at airport. Uber and InDriver reliable across the city.

miami.note: Uber/Lyft widely used. MIA airport to South Beach ~$25–40.

milan.note: Airport supplements: Malpensa €10 (train ~€13 much better), Linate €5.

minsk.note: Yandex Taxi dominant. Affordable by European standards. Check visa requirements and travel advisories before visiting Belarus.

moscow.note: Yandex Taxi standard. Check your government's travel advisory and sanctions situation before visiting Russia.

mugla.note: Covers Bodrum, Marmaris, Fethiye. Resort areas may have fixed zone pricing. Negotiate for longer trips.

mumbai.note: Prepaid taxis from airport safest. Uber/Ola reliable. AC taxis ~25% more.

munich.note: Night surcharge 21:00–06:00. MUC airport to city ~€65–80. S-Bahn S1/S8 significantly cheaper at €13.60.

nairobi.note: Use Uber or Bolt for safety — avoid hailing roadside taxis especially at night. Airport to CBD ~KSh 1,000–1,800 via Uber.

new_york.note: JFK flat rate to Manhattan $52 + tolls + tip. Congestion surcharge applies. AirTrain + subway much cheaper (~$9.25).

orlando.note: Uber/Lyft preferred. MCO airport to Disney World ~$35–55. Theme parks have their own paid transport.

osaka.note: Night surcharge 22:00–05:00 +20%. KIX airport to Namba ~8,000–12,000 ¥ — Haruka Express train (~2,850 ¥) much cheaper. Go app for taxi booking.

paris.note: Fixed rates: CDG ↔ Right Bank €55, CDG ↔ Left Bank €62, Orly ↔ Right Bank €35, Orly ↔ Left Bank €41. RER B train from CDG ~€11.80.

pattaya.note: Baht buses (blue songthaews) ~10–20฿ on fixed routes. Private taxis fixed price — agree before boarding. Grab less common than Bangkok.

phnom_penh.note: USD is standard. Grab and PassApp for transparent pricing. Tuk-tuks widespread and cheaper for short trips. Airport to Riverside ~$9–12.

phuket.note: ⚠️ Taxis have NO meters in Phuket — always agree price before boarding. Airport to Patong ~400–700฿. Official airport taxi counter recommended.

port_vila.note: Negotiate fare before boarding. Limited metered taxis. USD also accepted by some drivers.

prague.note: Use Bolt or Uber — street taxi overcharging of tourists is common. Airport to city centre ~600–700 Kč by app.

punta_cana.note: Taxis unmetered in tourist zone — fix price before boarding. USD is effective currency here. Airport to resort ~$25–40.

queenstown.note: Premium resort town — rates higher than NZ cities. Airport to town ~NZ$25–35.

quito.note: Meters mandatory by law. Airport to city ~$25–30. Altitude 2,850m — acclimatise before exertion.

reykjavik.note: Among the world's most expensive taxi cities. Keflavik airport to city ~ISK 16,000–20,000. FlyBus shuttle ~ISK 4,500.

rio_de_janeiro.note: Use 99 or Uber for safety — avoid hailing on the street at night. GIG airport to Ipanema ~R$80–120.

riyadh.note: Uber and Careem dominate. King Khalid Airport to city ~SAR 60–90. Very affordable for international visitors.

rome.note: Fixed rates: Fiumicino ↔ city ring road €50, Ciampino ↔ city €31. Night/Sunday supplements apply.

san_francisco.note: SFO to city ~$45–60. Bay Bridge toll added. BART from SFO cheaper (~$10.65). Uber/Lyft dominant.

san_jose.note: Orange official airport taxis (~₡15,000 to city). City red taxis must use meter (MARIA). Insist on it.

santo_domingo.note: Meters uncommon — negotiate fare first. Airport to city ~$20 USD.

sao_paulo.note: Uber/99 strongly recommended. Severe traffic can double metered fares. GRU airport to city ~R$80–130.

seattle.note: Uber/Lyft dominant. SEA-TAC Link Light Rail to downtown ~$3.50 — far cheaper than taxi (~$45–60).

seoul.note: Midnight surcharge +20%. AREX from ICN airport to Seoul Station excellent (~₩9,500). Kakao T app for cabs.

shanghai.note: DiDi app reliable and convenient. Pudong airport Metro Line 2 fast (~¥9). Night surcharge after 23:00.

sharjah.note: No Uber in Sharjah — use Careem. Cheaper than Dubai. Close to Dubai by cab.

sharm_el_sheikh.note: Tourist resort area — negotiate price first. Resort to Naama Bay ~E£30–50. White taxis should meter but often inflate for tourists.

shenzhen.note: Close to Hong Kong. DiDi popular. Airport Metro very efficient. Night surcharge applies.

singapore.note: Airport surcharge S$5–S$8. ERP road pricing charges added. MRT from Changi ~S$2.50 — faster and cheaper.

st_petersburg.note: Yandex Taxi standard. Check your government's travel advisory and sanctions situation before visiting Russia.

stockholm.note: Very expensive — use Bolt or Uber. Arlanda Airport to city ~500–650 kr — Arlanda Express train (20 min, ~299 kr) far cheaper. Night/weekend surcharge applies.

suzhou.note: Popular canal city. Metered taxis available. High-speed rail from Shanghai ~25 min for ¥34 — recommended.

sydney.note: Airport pickup fee A$4.50. Toll roads charged separately. Train from SYD airport ~A$19.84.

taipei.note: Meters mandatory and reliable. Airport MRT to city ~NT$165. Night surcharge 23:00–06:00.

tel_aviv.note: Meters mandatory. Gett and Yango apps popular. BEN to city ~₪130–170. Sherut (shared taxi) much cheaper.

tokyo.note: Night surcharge (22:00–05:00) +20%. Narita to city ~¥20,000 — take Narita Express (~¥3,070) instead.

toronto.note: Pearson airport to downtown ~CA$55–65. UP Express train ~CA$12.35 — much cheaper.

tunis.note: Yellow taxis with meters. Day Tariff A (06:00–21:00), higher Tariff B at night. Airport to medina ~10–15 DT.

vancouver.note: YVR airport to downtown ~CA$35–45. Canada Line SkyTrain cheaper at ~CA$4.25 (all zones).

varna.note: Night rates slightly higher. Airport to city ~8–12 лв. Very affordable by European standards.

venice.note: No road taxis. Water taxis: ~€50 short routes, €80–120 longer. Vaporetto (water bus) €9.50/ride — far cheaper for tourists.

vienna.note: Night surcharge 23:00–06:00. Airport taxi ~€36–40 flat. City Airport Train (CAT) or S-Bahn ~€4.40.

warsaw.note: Uber and Bolt widely used. WAW airport to city ~zł 60–80 via app. Night surcharge 22:00–06:00.

washington_dc.note: WMATA Metro excellent for tourist sites. DCA to downtown ~$25–35. Dulles (IAD) ~$65–85.

zurich.note: One of the world's most expensive taxi cities. ZRH airport train ~10 min for CHF 6.80 — highly recommended.
